title: AwardsWatch FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: ADAPTED SCREENPLAY and ORIGINAL SCREENPLAY
text: According to AwardsWatch's final predictions for the 98th Academy Awards, Ryan Coogler's screenplay for "Sinners" is predicted to win Best Original Screenplay. The Prediction: The predictor notes that "Sinners" has dominated the precursor awards, securing victories at BAFTA, Critics Choice Association, Golden Globes, and the Writers Guild Awards. As stated, "Ryan Coogler brings in BAFTA, Critics Choice and WGA for the original screenplay to Sinners." Predicted Top 5: 1. "Sinners" (Warner Bros) - Written by Ryan Coogler; 2. "Sentimental Value" (NEON) - Written by Eskil Vogt and Joachim Trier; 3. "Marty Supreme" (A24) - Written by Ronald Bronstein & Josh Safdie; 4. "Blue Moon" (Sony Pictures Classics) - Written by Robert Kaplow; 5. "It Was Just an Accident" (NEON) - Written by Jafar Panahi. Analysis: The article characterizes these screenplay categories as "two of the easiest categories to predict on Oscar night," emphasizing that "there is virtually no room for an upset" given the consistent sweep of major precursor awards by the frontrunners.
